message:
test(ftui-extras): improve timer.rs test coverage (bd-2yman)

Add 28 new tests (27→55 total) covering toggle when finished,
running() false when finished, start/stop idempotency, reset while
stopped, reset after finished with restart, multi-cycle counting,
progress at 25%/75%/after-reset, initial accessor stability,
format builder, tick return values (stopped/exact/after-finish),
sub-second interval tick_once, view at zero/clock-at-zero, compact
format edge cases (1s, subsec nanos, hours+subsec, single nano),
clock format boundaries (large hours, 59:59, single second), and
derive trait coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
